steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to describe the role refrigerants play in freezers. A successful choice must (1) name refrigerants explicitly and (2) explain their function, not just their chemistry.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'omits refrigerants': describes how freezers work without mentioning refrigerants at all. Fails the first requirement. ✗
  • Choice B — 'focuses on chemical composition': names refrigerants but describes their molecular structure rather than their function. Fails the second requirement. ✗
  • Choice C — 'describes phase-change mechanism': mentions the phase-change process but never states what role refrigerants play overall. Too indirect. ✗
  • Choice D — 'absorb heat and release cold air': directly states that freezers use refrigerants to absorb heat and release cold air, and grounds it with a concrete example (fluoromethane). Hits both requirements. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
